tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_uptake module

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_uptake.mock_crop_data() → CropData
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_uptake.test_determine_nitrogen_shape_parameters(halfheat: float, heatfrac: float, emerge: float, half: float, near: float, mature: float, should_fail: bool, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

check that the shape parameters are correctly calculated by determine_nshapes() and that errors were raised correctly

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_uptake.test_determine_shape_log(heatfrac: float, current: float, mature: float, emergence: float) → None

check that determine_shape_log() calculates correct output

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_uptake.test_error_determine_shape_log(heatfrac: float, current: float, mature: float, emergence: float, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

check that determine_shape_log() throws errors when appropriate

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_uptake.test_determine_optimal_nitrogen_fraction(heatfrac: float, emerge: float, mature: float, shape1: float, shape2: float) → None

Ensure that nitrogen fraction is correctly calculated by determine_optimal_nitrogen_fraction().

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_uptake.test_determine_nitrate_factor(nitrates: float, expect: float) → None
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_uptake.test_determine_fixation_stage_factor(heatfrac: float, expect: float) → None
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_uptake.test_determine_fixed_nitrogen(demand: float, stage: float, water: float, nitrate: float, expect: float) → None

check that nitrogen values are calculated as expected with determine_fixed_nitrogen()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_uptake.test_error_determine_fixed_nitrogen(demand: float, stage: float, water: float, nitrate: float, mocker: MockerFixture) → None
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_uptake.test_determine_stored_nitrogen(prev: float, new: float, fix: float) → None

test the stored nitrogen is properly calculated by determine_stored_nitrogen()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_uptake.test_try_fixation(fixer: bool, nitrates: float, water: float, mocker: MockerFixture, mock_crop_data: CropData) → None

check that try_fixation calls its sub-functions if fixation occurs

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_uptake.test_update_fixation_attributes(mocker: MockerFixture, mock_crop_data: CropData) → None

Check that update_nitrate_attributes calls both its sub-functions.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_uptake.test_fix_nitrogen(uptake: float, demand: float, water: float, fixfact: float, nitrate: float, mock_crop_data: CropData) → None

check that fixed nitrogen is properly calculated by fix_nitrogen()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_uptake.test_incorporate_nitrogen(mock_crop_data: CropData, nitrates: list[float], depths: list[float], water_factor: float, gate: bool) → None

Tests that nitrogen uptake and fixation is performed correctly.

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_nitrogen_uptake.test_uptake(mocker: MockerFixture, mock_crop_data: CropData) → None

Check that uptake() correctly called functions and variables were updated as expected.
